license_activation_model: external payment page plus license key activation and verification
entitlement_model: remote verification with local cache and offline grace fallback
pro_features: lifetime access to the current major version
paid_disclosure_copy: Upgrade opens an external payment page outside the extension.
Paste the license key inside the extension to activate or restore Pro access.
The extension does not process cards and does not ship payment secrets.
risk_notes: The current upgrade URL is a placeholder and not configured for live payments.
The current license endpoints are placeholders and must be replaced before real commercial collection.
Local-only, no-upload, and no-cloud-sync claims must remain true in the actual bundle.
next_step: Run monetization:security-scan and keep listing disclosure truthful until real payment endpoints are configured.
